=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (11:10-11:27) TS377037: `Schema.decodeSync` is used inside an Effect generator. `Schema.decode` preserves the typed Effect error channel for this operation without throwing. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

skipped by default
